title: Bar staff
description: Mix and serve drinks to patrons, directly or through waitstaff. All grounds maintenance workers not listed separately. Perform work involving the skills of two or more maintenance or craft occupations to keep machines, mechanical equipment, or the structure of a building in repair. Duties may involve pipe fitting; HVAC maintenance; insulating; welding; machining; carpentry; repairing electrical or mechanical equipment; installing, aligning, and balancing new equipment; and repairing buildings, floors, or stairs. (Based on 6 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Ask customers who become loud and obnoxious to leave, or physically remove them.
Stock bar with beer, wine, liquor, and related supplies such as ice, glassware, napkins, or straws.
Check identification of customers to verify age requirements for purchase of alcohol.
Create drink recipes and mix ingredients to prepare cocktails and other drinks.
Serve wine, bottled or draft beer, and snacks or food items to customers seated at the bar.
Arrange bottles and glasses to make attractive displays, and clean bars, work areas, and tables.
Take beverage orders from serving staff or directly from patrons.
Attempt to limit problems and liability related to customers' excessive drinking.
Balance cash receipts and maintain inventory by ordering new parts or supplies as needed.
